# Security Policy
## Versions
Any issues caused by using an older app or OS version cannot be justified under our policy. Please stay on the newest versions and update your default apps to receive the latest security features.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
Report any Vulnerability on these platforms:
1. Direct message @adthoughtsglobal in Discord
2. Email adthoughtsglobal@gmail.com

**Do not** report any vulnerability that can be abused or exploited on any other platforms than the ones mentioned above.
